issues.description: ReturnToHand is incorrect action. Cards are returned to deck and deck is shuffled, not returned to hand. Should use a custom action or sequence representing: return cards to deck + shuffle.
Target scope 'AllOpponentCharacters' is wrong. Effect targets opponent's hand (all cards in hand), not characters on board. Should target opponent's hand cards.
DrawCard action missing explicit target. Should specify 'OpponentPlayer' or similar to clarify opponent draws, not controller.
